extra.reason: Closed

Done: fresh broccoli_api DB created in existing core-db instance (template0, to dodge collation mismatch); Redis already present; DATABASE_URL (private), BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, BETTER_AUTH_URL, INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKEN set on the broccoli-api service.
Done: 0_init migration (better-auth tables) generated via migrate diff + applied via migrate deploy to broccoli_api. Verified 5 tables present.

Deployed & verified on Railway. Root cause of first failure: Railway used Node 18, incompatible with tsx --env-file-if-exists; pinned engines.node>=22. Live at https://broccoli-api-production.up.railway.app — /health, /trpc/health, /api/auth/* all 200; internal.ping correctly UNAUTHORIZED without token. GitHub auto-deploy confirmed.

Registered server-side @better-auth/expo expo() plugin (pairs with mobile expoClient), tuned sessions to 30d expiry/1d updateAge, kept broccolimobile:// trustedOrigins. Verified end-to-end against ephemeral Postgres: sign-up/email creates user, session cookie authorizes tRPC me, expiresAt confirms 30d window, no-cookie returns UNAUTHORIZED.
Verified from Android dev build: /health reachable and sign-in completes against deployed broccoli-api (Railway).
Phase 0 complete: broccoli-api scaffolded, deployed to Railway with Postgres, better-auth for mobile, /health + auth verified reachable from a device.
Added Receipt, Item, ItemType models + ReceiptStatus enum; migration 20260630172917_add_receipt_item_itemtype verified against ephemeral Postgres (tables, FKs, indexes present); typecheck passes.

Seeded 661 ItemTypes from USDA FoodKeeper (CC0). Vendored faithful source JSON (prisma/seeds/foodkeeper.json); seed.ts derives name (subtitle-disambiguated, all unique), category (14 top-level), representative lifespan (collapsed from FoodKeeper timeframes; Indefinitely->10y; 10 durationless items left 0 for Phase 3 LLM fallback), storageAdvice, source, raw. Idempotent (deleteMany+createMany). Verified against ephemeral Postgres.

Model-side refactor complete & merged in broccoli-model#11: /ocr is stateless (accepts itemTypes:[{name,category}] in payload, no Receipt write, no core-DB read, x-api-key kept). API-side catalog-passing when calling /ocr is tracked under 2r8.5.

Wired UploadThing (v7 fetch adapter). New src/uploadthing.ts defines the receiptImage FileRouter (image, 8MB, 1 file) with a better-auth-gated middleware (rejects unauthenticated) and onUploadComplete returning {uploadedBy,url,key}. Mounted on Hono at ALL /api/uploadthing; OurFileRouter type exported via package './uploadthing' for the mobile client. UPLOADTHING_TOKEN documented in .env.example + README. Receipt persistence with url/key is deferred to receipt.create (2r8.5). Verified: typecheck clean; server boots; GET /api/uploadthing returns the receiptImage route config.

Verified end to end locally on main: signed-up better-auth user; receipt.create with a real Whole Foods receipt (public UploadThing URL) -> PROCESSING; background parse via local broccoli-model (Vision OCR + Gemini) -> READY with 17 items, store name, prices, ItemType-snapped categories, rawExtraction stored, total summed from line prices; receipt.confirm with corrections (renamed item, removed item, hand-added item, set purchasedAt/total) -> SAVED; all rows verified directly in Postgres; unauthenticated access correctly 401s. Required fixing retired gemini-2.0-flash in broccoli-model (PR #13). Follow-ups filed: Railway env vars missing on broccoli-api; tRPC stack-trace leak; ocrUrl error swallowing (broccoli-model).
All 6 children done; Phase 1 core loop verified API-side end to end (see 2r8.6).
ItemStatus enum + status/resolvedAt on Item, composite (userId,status) index replacing the single-column one; migration applied to local broccoli_api.
item.list / item.resolve / item.unresolve implemented with flat InventoryItem output alias; typecheck clean.

Verified against local api+db: 17 ACTIVE items listed with receipt context; resolve EATEN/TOSSED set status+resolvedAt and dropped from list; unresolve restored ACTIVE and cleared resolvedAt; unauth 401; unknown id NOT_FOUND.
Phase 2 api surface complete and verified: inventory listing + check-in resolve/undo.

Per-location lifespans + tips derived from raw FoodKeeper in seed (364 fridge/302 pantry/342 freezer of 661); Item gains itemTypeId FK, storageLocation, expiresAt, expirationSource; ItemStatus += EXPIRED; seed switched to name-keyed upserts for stable ids; migration applied locally.

receipt.confirm links items to ItemType and stamps expiresAt (fridge>pantry>freezer default, from purchase date, FOODKEEPER source); item.list now includes EXPIRED items; legacy lifespan join kept for pre-Phase-3 rows.
item.adjustExpiration sets USER source; future date un-expires EXPIRED (never eaten/tossed). Verified.
internal.expireItems flips ACTIVE past-due to EXPIRED (resolvedAt stays null), token-gated (401 without), idempotent, returns count. Verified.

Local e2e: confirm stamped bananas/eggs/tuna with correct locations+dates; uncategorized untouched; adjust->USER; sweep expired the past-due banana; list carried EXPIRED; future-date adjust reactivated it.
setStorageLocation verified locally: FRIDGE/USER Jul 8 -> FREEZER/FOODKEEPER Sep 26 (purchase+90d); no-data locations leave date untouched; future recompute un-expires.

Gemini REST fallback (native fetch, no SDK, no broccoli-model hop) fires after confirm for expirationSource-null items; guarded updates never clobber user/foodkeeper values; no-op with warning when AI_KEY unset. Verified: sourdough PANTRY +3d, hot sauce PANTRY +1y, rotisserie chicken FRIDGE +3d, matched banana untouched.
Phase 3 api epic complete: per-location shelf life, save-time stamping, user corrections (date+location), scheduler sweep, LLM fallback — all verified.
PushToken + NotificationSettings models migrated.
push.register/unregister + getSettings/updateSettings verified: token upsert, device tz capture, defaults, validation.

internal.sendNudges verified against the real Expo push API: grouped message per user, fake token returned DeviceNotRegistered and was pruned, lastNudgeAt stamped via upsert, once-per-day + quiet-hours (wrapping) + nudgesEnabled suppression all confirmed, token-gated.
Full local verification pass; see pez.3 notes.
Phase 4 api complete: token registry, prefs, grouped quiet-hour-aware nudge engine.
stats.overview: spend/eaten/wasted/active values, dual waste rates, counts, 8-week spend+waste series; flat aliases.
Verified against local db: totals equal raw sums, null value-rate with unpriced items, 401 unauth. Richer-data pass rides with the mobile dashboard verification.
Phase 5 api complete.
Shipped: pnpm db:demo seeds 8 receipts / 48 items; verified locally against broccoli_api (all statuses present, categories roll up, only intentional unlinked items).

errorFormatter strips stack from all tRPC error responses and masks INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR messages; onError logs unexpected failures server-side. Verified live: 401/400 shapes carry code+httpStatus+path only.
